Export.zv: IRIS for UNIX (Ubuntu Server LTS for ARM64 Containers) 2024.3 (Build 217U)

Class.name: Phonebook.Installer
Class.Description:
MIS Phonebook Installer
********************************************************************
N O T I C E
THIS IS TEST/DEMO SOFTWARE
This code is not supported by InterSystems as part of any released product.
It is supplied by InterSystems as a demo/test tool.
The user or customer is fully responsible for the maintenance of this software.
InterSystems shall bear no responsibility nor liabilities for errors or misuse of this code.
********************************************************************

XData.name: PhonebookApp
XData.Data:
<Manifest>
<Namespace Name="CUSTOMER" Create="yes" Code="CUSTOMER" Data="CUSTOMER" Ensemble = "0" >
<If Condition="(${CUSTEXIST}=0)">
<Database Name="CUSTOMER" Dir="${DBDIR}customer/" Create="yes" Resource="%DB_%DEFAULT" PublicPermissions="" />
</If>
<Configuration> <CSPApplication Url="/csp/customer" Resource="" Description="Customer Web Interface" Directory="${CSPDIR}customer" Recurse="1" AutoCompile="0" CookiePath="/csp/customer" AuthenticationMethods="32" /> </Configuration> </Namespace>
<Namespace Name="PERSONAL" Create="yes" Code="PERSONAL" Data="PERSONAL" Ensemble = "0" >
<If Condition="(${PERSONALEXIST}=0)">
<Database Name="PERSONAL" Dir="${DBDIR}personal/" Create="yes" Resource="%DB_%DEFAULT" PublicPermissions=""/>
</If>
<Configuration> <CSPApplication Url="/csp/personal" Resource="" Description="Personal Web Interface" Directory="${CSPDIR}personal" Recurse="1" AutoCompile="0" CookiePath="/csp/personal" AuthenticationMethods="32" /> </Configuration> </Namespace>
<Namespace Name="PHONEBOOK" Create="overwrite" Code="PBCODE" Data="COMPANY" Ensemble = "0" >
<If Condition="(${PBCODEEXIST}=0)">
<Database Name="PBCODE" Dir="${DBDIR}pbcode/" Create="yes" Resource="%DB_%DEFAULT" PublicPermissions=""/>
</If>
<If Condition="(${COMPEXIST}=0)">
<Database Name="COMPANY" Dir="${DBDIR}company/" Create="yes" Resource="%DB_%DEFAULT" PublicPermissions=""/>
</If>
<Configuration> <GlobalMapping Global="Phonebook.Customer*" From="CUSTOMER"/> <GlobalMapping Global="Phonebook.Personal*" From="PERSONAL"/>
<CSPApplication Url="/csp/phonebook" Resource="" Description="Phonebook Web Interface" Directory="${CSPDIR}phonebook" Recurse="1" AutoCompile="0" CookiePath="/csp/phonebook" AuthenticationMethods="32" />
<CSPApplication Url="/csp/company" Resource="" Description="Company pages" Directory="${CSPDIR}company" Recurse="1" AutoCompile="0" CookiePath="/csp/company" AuthenticationMethods="32" /> </Configuration>
<CopyFile Src="${PHONEBOOKFILESDIR}cube_logo_blue.gif" Target="${CSPDIR}phonebook/"/>
<CopyFile Src="${PHONEBOOKFILESDIR}Company.csp" Target="${CSPDIR}company/"/>
<Import File="${STUDENTDIR}PhonebookClasses.xml" Flags="ck"/>
<LoadPage Name="/csp/company/Company.csp" /> <Invoke Class="Phonebook.Company" Method="Populate"> <Arg Value="5"/> </Invoke> <Invoke Class="Phonebook.Customer" Method="Populate"> <Arg Value="5"/> </Invoke> <Invoke Class="Phonebook.Personal" Method="Populate"> <Arg Value="5"/> </Invoke> </Namespace>
</Manifest>

Method.name: RunInstall
Method.Description: Invoke the installer passing in some variables. studentDir = Normalized location of student files. dbDir = parent directory for folders that will hold company, customer, and personal DBs (uses Manager directory if not defined). logLevel = level of logging on scale of 0-3 (0 = none, 3 = verbose).

Method.name: setup
Method.Implementation: #; Let XGL document generate code for this method. return ##class(%Installer.Manifest).%Generate(%compiledclass, %code, "PhonebookApp")
